question: What is the relative position between the leaf and the flower? Select from the following options: (A) The leaf is above the flower. (B) The leaf is on the right of the flower. (C) The leaf is on the left of the flower. (D) The leaf is below the flower.
gold_answer: The leaf is below the flower
answer_choices: The leaf is above the flower
The leaf is on the right of the flower
The leaf is on the left of the flower
The leaf is below the flower

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A leaf positioned above the flower, clearly higher in the vertical axis.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The leaf is below the flower or at the same level as the flower.

inpaint_prompt_used: A leaf positioned above the flower, clearly higher in the vertical axis.
negative_prompt_used: The leaf is below the flower or at the same level as the flower.
